title: calamagrostis neglecta subsp. holmii
intro: Calamagrostis neglecta subsp. holmii, also known as Holm's wood grass, is a subspecies of a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Holm's wood grass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Holm's wood grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
